nasb.text: Draw up your battle lines against Babylon on every side, All you who bend the bow; Shoot at her, do not be sparing with your arrows, For she has sinned against the Lord.

esv.text: Set yourselves in array against Babylon all around, all you who bend the bow; shoot at her, spare no arrows, for she has sinned against the Lord.

cnv.text: 所有拉弓的啊！ 你們要在巴比倫四圍列陣； 射箭攻擊它，不要吝嗇箭枝， 因為它得罪了耶和華。

ccb.text: 弓箭手啊，你们要列阵围攻巴比伦， 向她猛射， 不要吝啬箭枝， 因为她得罪了耶和华。
